query:
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.chineseName, c.name as category_name,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE subcategoryId = s.id) as product_count
FROM subcategories s 
JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Sweet%' OR c.name LIKE '%甜品%';
command:
